svg.text: Any quality can become fuel for conceit
Neither exalts himself, nor disparages others

g.text: “It is not because of these that
states of greed, aversion, or delusion
“One who practices in accordance with the Dhamma
is worthy of honor and praise.”
so tattha pujjo, so tattha pāsaṁso

svg.text: open-air dweller, upright sitter, who eats in one sitting

g.text: “It is not because of these that
states of greed, aversion, or delusion
“One who practices in accordance with the Dhamma
is worthy of honor and praise.”
so tattha pujjo, so tattha pāsaṁso

svg.text: For meditative attainments, the person of integrity practices non-identification
Cessation of Perception and What is Felt
And having seen with wisdom, mental defilements are completely exhausted
saññāvedayitanirodha — paññāya cassa disvā āsavā parikkhīṇā
saññāvedayitanirodha — paññāya cassa disvā āsavā parikkhīṇā
Such a one does not conceive anything, does not conceive in regard to anything, does not conceive in any way
kiñci maññati, na kuhiñci maññati, na kenaci maññati
